no: Some overhauls overlap with ToF's revised kits — skip conflicting AK components or disable ToF's on its .ini. Re-Enable Classes components should go before Tweaks Anthology.

conflicts.reason: AK kit overhauls and cdtweaks racial restrictions + Luke class feats modify overlapping class abilities
conflicts.myComps: #1 Enable All Classes for All Races
conflicts.theirComps: #2360 Remove Racial Restrictions #2380 Remove Racial Restrictions for Kits #2350 #2351 #2352 #2353 #2358 Multi-class restrictions #6080 Divine Grace Paladins #6110 Sneak Attack Blackguards #6120 Fearless Halflings #6140 Planar Turning #6160 Barbarian Rage

conflicts.reason: HT cn:2 (Expanded Shapeshifting) and AK cn:5100 (Shapeshifter Overhaul) both modify CLABDR04.2DA — pick one or install HT before AK. HT cn:5 (Rebalanced Weapon Styles) modifies WEAPPROF rows 28-31; AK fighter kits use ADD_KIT_EX which writes kit-specific columns — no overlap. HT cn:4 (Rebalanced Proficiencies) modifies WEAPPROF globally — conflicts with AK fighter overhauls if both selected.
conflicts.theirComps: #2 Expanded Shapeshifting #4 Rebalanced Proficiencies #5 Rebalanced Weapon Styles
conflicts.source: HT modifies CLABDR04/WEAPPROF rows 28-31; AK replaces CLABDR03 and uses ADD_KIT_EX columns, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Only JT cn:50 (NPC null kits) is from this list. JT cn:50 assigns default kit (0x40000000) to joinable NPCs with null kits — but only IF kit==0. AK's kit overhauls create new kits (Berserker, Wizard Slayer, Kensai, etc.) that NPCs would only get via ArtisansKitpack_npc Safe — JT cn:50's condition (kit==0) skips NPCs that already have kits. JT cn:81-83 (Shapeshift) and cn:240 (Undead Hunter)
conflicts.theirComps: #50 NPC null kits (IN preset, safe) #81 #82 #83 Shapeshift corrections (NOT in preset) #240 Undead Hunter (NOT in preset)
conflicts.source: JT cn:50 uses PATCH_IF kit==0 condition; AK creates new kits via ADD_KIT_EX; AK_npc, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: NOT a conflict. SCS cn:4100 (Improved NPC customization) reads the kit field (offset 0x244) but NEVER writes to it during installation. Kit customization happens at runtime via AddKit() game action in dialogue. AK's kit assignments (from ArtisansKitpack_npc) persist through SCS installation. SCS has no detection of AK. ArtisansKitpack_npc regardless.
conflicts.source: SCS leveller_2.tpa lines 303-304 READ_SHORT 0x244 but no WRITE; kit changes are runtime AddKit() in customise_2.tpa dialogue, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Only relevant if AK Red Wizard kit is installed (in ArtisansKitpack_npc, AK Red Wizard modifies misc89.itm (Edwin's amulet) via redwizard.tpa. SD IT cn:1091-1093 also modify misc89.itm. If both installed, last-installed-wins on amulet effects. AK Red Wizard, SD IT cn:1092 IS selected. No overlap — SD IT safely nerfs the amulet without AK interference.
conflicts.myComps: Red Wizard kit (in ArtisansKitpack_npc, NOT in preset)
conflicts.theirComps: #1092 Edwin Amulet limited to 7th level (IN preset)
conflicts.source: AK redwizard.tpa modifies misc89.itm; SD IT tweak_edwin_amulet modifies misc89.itm; AK Red Wizard, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: No overlap . AK paladin overhauls (cn:3000-3011) — fighter/thief kits are. SnA cn:80 (Paladin Abilities) modifies CLABPA01.2DA which no selected AK component touches. SnA cn:60 (Inquisitor), cn:130 (Blade), cn:170 (Archer), cn:300 (Weapon Styles) all Only SnA cn:80 is selected and it has no file overlap with selected AK fighter/thief kits.
conflicts.myComps: #3000-#3011 Paladin Overhauls (NOT in preset) #1003 #1004 #1006 #1100 Fighter kits (IN preset, no SnA overlap)
conflicts.theirComps: #80 Paladin Abilities (IN preset, no AK overlap) #60 #130 #170 #300 (NOT in preset)
conflicts.source: SnA cn:80 modifies CLABPA01; no selected AK component touches paladin CLABs; AK paladin overhauls, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: AK monk kits assume vanilla Monk class. MO disables vanilla Monk entirely, breaking AK monk kits.
conflicts.myComps: #10001 Monk Revisions #10002 Brawler #10003 Sacred Fist #10004 Ninja

conflicts.reason: Install-order supersession: if Artisan's Kitpack #5100 is installed first, cdtweaks #1150 (Reveal Map Icons) auto-skips via !MOD_IS_INSTALLED predicate. Intentional by CamDawg.

Pale Master: access to all Necromancy divine spells

passive.desc: +1 THAC0 with missiles at lv1, scaling every 5 levels
Projectiles gain +1 enchantment and +1 magic damage, scaling to +5 at lv20

restrictions.armor: no armor heavier than elven chain
restrictions.items: d8 hit die. -3 THAC0 penalty with melee. Max 1 pip in non-bow weapons.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (no custom additions documented)

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (fighter kit). Uses innate arcane arrow abilities.

statBonus.note: Requires elf, half-elf, or human race

passive.desc: Pick Pockets, Open Locks, Find/Remove Traps at 100. Up to 6 traps per area.

activated.effects: 2-10 poison damage, CON drain 1-3, save penalties scale to -4 at lv21+.
10d10+20 missile damage, paralysis or slow, 24 bleed. Not vs undead/elementals.

restrictions.items: Arcane spells instead of druid spells. No Charm Animal. No dual-class. All alignments, never falls.

spellRestrictions.note: Uses mage spells instead of ranger druid spells

passive.desc: Spells cast while hidden have casting time reduced to 1

activated.effects: Steals highest memorized arcane spell from target. At lv10+ also strips spell protections.
Backstabs reduce target's DEX and saves vs spells for 1 hour.

restrictions.items: Mage/Thief multiclass kit. 20 skill pts/level. Requires INT 12, DEX 12.

hlaPool.note: Mage/Thief multiclass kit; uses mage HLA pool

new: Fighter combining archery with arcane magic. Enchanted arrows and spell shots.
Ranger stalking prey through darkness. Enhanced stealth and night-hunting abilities.
Thief with minor arcane talent. Combines roguish skills with illusion magic.

sum: Massive kitpack with 50 new kits across all classes. One of the largest and most varied kit collections available.

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Dark Hunter Ranger Kit
co.no: HARD FAIL: Uses ClassSpellTool (ADD_CLASS_SPELL) to register C0DH101-304 as priest-type spells — only AK component that does so. ClassSpellTool initializes MEPR1.TXT on first use (copies from ArtisansKitpack/no_overwrite/). Fails with 'MEPR1.TXT not found in KEY file' if a previous partial AK/BW install left stale MEWI1.txt in override but MEPR1.txt is absent — initialization is skipped and the APPEND fails. Fix: delete stale MEWI*.txt and MEPR*.txt from override before reinstalling. cn:1001 Arcane Archer (F/M) installs WITH WARNINGS: 'Internal ability name too long [C0ARC03Z], making copy as [SGAB0000]' — cosmetic, does not affect function.
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Dark Hunter Ranger Kit

advisories.reason: aTweaks druid shapeshift and clone tweaks may conflict with AK's shapeshifter overhaul
FnP paladin kits overlap with AK's paladin overhauls; druid kit assignments may conflict with AK's Hivemaster/Elementalist

Component-level overlaps — choose carefully if using both. AK cn:5100 (Shapeshifter) vs ToF cn:41000: DESTRUCTIVE — both replace CLABDR03.2DA, pick one. AK cn:1003 (Berserker) vs ToF cn:41000: AK replaces CLABFI02 entirely using C0BER#00 Rage — ToF's progressive-immunity Berserker Rage (SPCL321) becomes dead code. AK cn:1006 (Wizard Slayer) vs ToF cn:41000: both modify magic resistance progression, may stack unexpectedly. AK cn:1100 (Fighter Overhaul) vs ToF cn:81100: AK's auto-specialization spell uses SPLPROT proficiency checks that may silently fail under ToF's Lua proficiency system. AK cn:1004 (Kensai): safe — ToF has no Kensai rebalance. AK Assassin/Blackguard poison: breaks ToF feat system if both installed. Neither mod detects the other. Install AK before ToF.
advisories.myComps: #5100 Shapeshifter #1003 Berserker #1006 Wizard Slayer #1100 Fighter Overhaul #1004 Kensai (safe) #3004 Blackguard #7004 Assassin (poison/feat issue)
advisories.theirComps: #41000 Rebalanced Kits #81100 Weapon Proficiency #40600 Druid shapeshift
advisories.source: AK COPY_EXISTING replaces CLABFI02/03/DR03; ToF kit.edit modifies same CLABs via SFO; cn:81100 externalizes WEAPPROF to Lua; no cross-detection, 2026-04
